1825570.name: Ascended Survivor Demo
1825570.description:
Ascend to the Earth's Surface and take back your home!

Inspired by classic shmups like ZeroRanger and first-person shooters like Doom Eternal, Ascended Survivor delivers intense combat with action-packed music and deep lore.

  • Fight your way through the unique layers of the planet
  • Use powerful abilities to destroy your foes
  • Discover what left you in the Earth's core, and what it will take to get back what you love

This demo contains the first level of Ascended Survivor.
